disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset of profuse watery, non-bloody diarrhoea over the last several hours
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started suddenly a few hours ago and I've had really watery runny diarrhoea over and over since then.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Repeated vomiting with inability to retain oral fluids
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep anything down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I keep being sick, and every time I try to sip something it comes straight back up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Diffuse crampy abdominal pain with no single focal point
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any tummy pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are crampy pains but they're all across my belly, not in one particular spot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: General malaise, body aches, and a mild self-limited feverish feeling earlier
trigger_question_examples: How do you feel in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I ache all over and felt a bit hot earlier in the evening, and I just feel drained.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood visible in the stool
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen any blood in the diarrhoea?
Is the stool black or bloody?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't seen any blood, it's just watery.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent travel; tried an over-the-counter anti-diarrhoeal without relief
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No travel anywhere. I took an over-the-counter anti-diarrhoea tablet but it didn't help.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with limited support to maintain hydration
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone at home with you?
Do you have help if this gets worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own, so it's just me trying to manage this.
